name: sourceright
description: Local stdio MCP server for Sourceright reference verification, CSL evidence, review queues, and audited write plans.
long_description: Sourceright runs as a local stdio MCP server. Provider evidence stays in references.verification.json and never silently overwrites canonical references.csl.json. Write-capable tools default to dry-run plans and require explicit apply semantics.

workspace_root.title: Sourceright workspace
workspace_root.description: Optional path to a .sourceright workspace directory. Defaults to the current working directory.
